sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Names Targa Resources Top Midstream Pick
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has named Targa Resources (TRGP) as its top pick in the midstream energy infrastructure sector, maintaining an Overweight rating and setting a $327 price target. This decision is driven by expected increases in Permian Basin gas production and broader investor interest in natural gas assets, further supported by Goldman Sachs also raising its price target for TRGP. Targa Resources has also increased its quarterly dividend to $1.25 per share.

feed.title: JLL targets 2026 adjusted EPS of $21.80 to $23.50 as it trends toward the upper end amid macro fluidity
feed.summary: JLL (Jones Lang LaSalle) has set a target for adjusted EPS in 2026 ranging from $21.80 to $23.50. The company anticipates trending towards the higher end of this range, demonstrating confidence in its performance despite a dynamic macroeconomic environment. This outlook provides investors with specific financial guidance for the coming years.

feed.title: New American Canyon homes near trails and schools start in the $590Ks
feed.summary: KB Home has launched Sorrel, a new community in the Watson Ranch master plan in American Canyon, California, offering two-story single-family homes starting in the $590Ks. These homes are designed to be ENERGY STAR certified and are located near planned parks, extensive trails, and highly-rated schools, with convenient access to Napa and Sonoma wine countries. The new community aims to provide personalized, energy-efficient homes within a desirable location that emphasizes outdoor amenities and accessibility.

feed.title: Peacock Takes Flight: United Launches New Inflight Entertainment Channel
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. (UAL) has launched a new inflight entertainment channel featuring content from Peacock, as announced in a press release. This initiative aims to enhance the customer experience on United flights. Quantisnow, a real-time market data platform, delivered this insight, highlighting its role in providing timely information to retail investors.

feed.title: KB HOME OPENS SORREL: NEW HOMES FROM THE $590Ks WITHIN THE DESIRABLE WATSON RANCH MASTER PLAN IN AMERICAN CANYON, CALIFORNIA
feed.summary: KB Home has announced the opening of Sorrel, a new community of homes starting from the $590s within the Watson Ranch master plan in American Canyon, California. This development is part of KB Home's strategy to expand its offerings in desirable locations. The article also provides recent analyst ratings and insider transaction details for KBH.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald raises Equinix stock price target on AI strength
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald raised its price target for Equinix Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) to $1,186 from $1,173, maintaining an Overweight rating, citing the company's critical role in AI evolution. This adjustment follows Equinix's strong first-quarter 2026 sales activity and a reduction in monthly recurring revenue churn, despite revenue and EBITDA slightly missing expectations due to lease timing. Other analysts like Raymond James, Scotiabank, and BofA Securities have also positively revised their targets, driven by Equinix's growing exposure to AI demand and strategic growth initiatives.

feed.title: Peacock shows arrive on 160,000 United seatback screens May 1
feed.summary: United Airlines has launched a dedicated Peacock inflight entertainment channel across 160,000 seatback screens and its mobile app, starting May 1, 2026. This new offering includes popular titles like "The Traitors" and "Poker Face" and significantly expands United's existing library of over 1,600 hours of content. The airline highlights its industry-leading inflight technology, including Bluetooth audio and new 4K OLED screens, as part of its ongoing investment in customer experience.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International $MGM Shares Sold by Savoir Faire Capital Management L.P.
feed.summary: Savoir Faire Capital Management L.P. significantly reduced its stake in MGM Resorts International by 48.6% in Q4, selling over 34,000 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their holdings, and the company reported record Q1 net revenues driven by MGM China and digital growth, though it missed non-GAAP EPS estimates. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating, while insider activity shows both buying (IAC) and selling (Director Keith Meister).

feed.title: Savoir Faire Capital Management L.P. Has $4.83 Million Stake in Kraft Heinz Company $KHC
feed.summary: Savoir Faire Capital Management L.P. reduced its stake in Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) by 59.8% in Q4, holding 199,266 shares valued at $4.83 million. Despite beating EPS estimates, Kraft Heinz missed revenue forecasts and analysts have a "Reduce" rating on the stock with an average price target of $23.47. The company offers a 7.1% dividend yield.

feed.title: Only 45 practices made Elevance Health's top 1% provider list
feed.summary: Elevance Health recognized 45 distinguished medical practices and health systems in its annual Care Provider Recognition Program, spotlighting the top one percent of primary care providers in its network. These honorees demonstrated excellence in delivering high-quality, coordinated care based on key performance measures such as preventive screenings, immunization rates, chronic disease management, and medication adherence. The program aims to acknowledge primary care providers who enhance patient lives through improved quality and outcomes.

feed.title: Stryker to participate in the Bank of America Securities 2026 Global Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) will participate in the Bank of America Securities 2026 Global Healthcare Conference on May 13, 2026, in Las Vegas, Nevada. Spencer Stiles, Jason Beach, and Nick Mead will represent the company, with their presentation scheduled for 1:40 p.m. Pacific Time. A live webcast and replay will be available on Stryker’s website.

feed.title: PG&E Tesla V2X Program Adds Cybertruck
feed.summary: PG&E and Tesla have announced that the Tesla Cybertruck, Powershare Gateway, and Universal Wall Connector are now approved for PG&E's residential Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) program. This initiative allows Cybertruck owners to use their vehicle for home backup during outages and earn money by selling power back to the grid, representing California's first AC vehicle-to-grid application. Customers can receive up to $4,500 in incentives for participating in this program, which aims to enhance grid resilience and affordability.

feed.title: New Aflac office will handle paid leave claims for 500,000 Maine workers
feed.summary: Aflac has opened a new office in South Portland, Maine, to administer the state's Paid Family and Medical Leave (PFML) program. This facility will manage claims for over 500,000 eligible Maine workers starting May 1, 2026, serving both public and private sector employers. The move reinforces Aflac's commitment to supporting Maine workers and families with high-quality local services.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble named the most innovative home products company in the United States in 2026
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble has been recognized by Fortune and Statista as the most innovative home products company in the United States for the third consecutive year. The company's success is attributed to its consumer-centric strategy, significant investment in research and development, and a strong innovation-driven organizational culture. This achievement highlights P&G's ability to consistently develop practical solutions through technological advancements and a deep understanding of consumer needs.

feed.title: Alaska Air downgraded by Citigroup with a new price target

This rating change follows several other analyst updates for Alaska Air, with previous price targets ranging from $50.00 to $90.00 from different firms. Quantisnow, a platform providing real-time market data to retail investors, delivered this insight.

feed.title: Netflix, Cisco, Zoom And A Health Care Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: CNBC's 'Final Trades' featured recommendations for Cisco Systems, AbbVie Inc., Netflix, Inc., and Zoom Communications, Inc. Jim Lebenthal of Cerity Partners recommended Cisco, while Jason Snipe of Odyssey Capital Advisors liked AbbVie due to its strong Q1 2026 earnings. Joshua Brown of Ritholtz Wealth Management suggested Netflix despite a weak Q2 forecast, and Joseph M. Terranova of Virtus Investment Partners noted Zoom Communications' continued upward trend.

feed.title: What's Going On With Baxter International Stock Friday? - Baxter International (NYSE:BAX)
feed.summary: Baxter International reported mixed first-quarter results, with adjusted earnings beating consensus but declining 35% year-over-year due to tariffs and higher manufacturing costs. Sales surpassed Wall Street estimates but showed a 1% organic decline. Despite operational challenges and a bearish technical outlook, the company reaffirmed its fiscal 2026 earnings and sales guidance.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Company $CL Stock Holdings Lowered by Savoir Faire Capital Management L.P.
feed.summary: Savoir Faire Capital Management L.P. substantially reduced its stake in Colgate-Palmolive Company ($CL) by 48.4% in the fourth quarter, selling 11,986 shares and retaining 12,786 shares valued at approximately $1.01 million. This reduction comes despite Colgate-Palmolive exceeding quarterly earnings expectations and raising its dividend. Meanwhile, other institutional investors showed mixed activity, with some increasing their holdings, and the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with an average target price of $95.56, even as company insiders sold a significant number of shares.

feed.title: Pegasus Asset Management Inc. Raises Position in The Boeing Company $BA
feed.summary: Pegasus Asset Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) by 63.3% during the fourth quarter, now owning 21,664 shares valued at $4.7 million. This makes Boeing its 23rd largest position, accounting for 1.4% of its portfolio. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in Boeing, and the company has seen insider transactions, analyst upgrades, and positive news regarding new orders and partnerships.

feed.title: First Solar sees ‘record’ sales and income growth in Q1 2026
feed.summary: First Solar reported record sales and income growth in Q1 2026, with net sales reaching US$1.04 billion and net income at US$347 million. The company shipped a record 3.8GW of CdTe thin-film modules and benefited from US trade protections and manufacturing incentives like the 45X Advanced Manufacturing credit. First Solar also introduced its "CuRe" technology, expected to enhance energy yield and lower degradation compared to crystalline silicon TOPCon.

feed.title: Moderna Stock Spikes After Earnings. Covid Vaccine Revenue Is a Growth Driver Again.
feed.summary: Moderna's stock surged after the company reported strong first-quarter results, primarily driven by higher international demand for its Covid vaccine. This performance defied expectations of a slowdown in Covid vaccine revenue.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) reported first-quarter funds from operations (FFO) of $1.88 per share, exceeding Wall Street expectations of $1.82 per share. The real estate investment trust also surpassed revenue forecasts, posting $341.1 million against an expected $333.8 million. For the full year, the company anticipates FFO to be between $7.46 and $7.55 per share.

feed.title: (FRT) Federal Realty Investment Trust Expects 2026 Core FFO per Share Range $7.46 - $7.55, vs. FactSet Est of $7.43
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) projects its 2026 Core FFO per share to be between $7.46 and $7.55, exceeding FactSet's estimate of $7.43. This announcement follows the company's Q1 Core FFO and revenue increase, with Q1 Core FFO at $1.88 per share against an estimated $1.80, and Q1 revenue at $341.1 million versus an estimated $332.1 million. The company, a real estate investment trust specializing in retail-based properties in coastal markets, also recently acquired Kingstowne Retail in Washington, DC for $19.7 million and a shopping center in Maryland for $72.3 million.

feed.title: Dominion Energy: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Dominion Energy Inc. reported strong first-quarter earnings, with a net income of $621 million, or 69 cents per share. After adjustments, earnings reached 95 cents per share, surpassing Wall Street's expectations of 89 cents per share. The company's revenue of $5.02 billion also exceeded forecasts, and Dominion Energy anticipates full-year earnings between $3.45 and $3.69 per share.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (CBOE) Cboe Global Markets, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $728.9M, vs. FactSet Est of $703.4M
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. announced its Q1 revenue reached $728.9 million, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $703.4 million. The report indicates a stronger financial performance for the company than anticipated by analysts. This flash earnings report provides key financial data for investors and market watchers.

Despite the stock performance, analysts anticipate profitability this year, and the company recently reported strong Q4 results and announced new strategic partnerships.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (D) Dominion Energy, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $5.02B, vs. FactSet Est of $4.43B
feed.summary: Dominion Energy, Inc. reported its first-quarter revenue at $5.02 billion, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $4.43 billion. The company also announced its Q1 operating earnings and revenue had risen, and its Q1 adjusted EPS reached $0.95 per share, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $0.90. Dominion Energy expects its 2026 operating EPS to range from $3.45 to $3.69, compared to the FactSet estimate of $3.59.

feed.title: The J M Smucker Q3 earnings on deck: Is a beat likely for SJM?

Analysts are anticipating revenue of $1.99 billion and adjusted EPS of $2.27, representing a decline from the prior year, primarily due to the divestiture of certain pet food brands. While the company has a mixed earnings surprise history, this quarter's outlook is cautiously optimistic based on sales growth in key segments and recent strategic moves.
